items.title: Run a second empathy-framed Reel before the August dip
items.rationale: p003 ('You're not lazy. You're hot.') hit 940 saves - 4x the educational baseline. Learning l001 said empathy framing beats tactic-led during seasonal slumps. Mid-August is the next natural slump moment.
items.suggestedAction: draft hydration-2 instagram Reel pillar=Education campaign="Hydration & Heat" hook="You're not slacking. You're under-recovered."

items.title: Replace 'last chance' urgency copy on the closing window
items.rationale: Learning l003 flagged that 'last chance' urgency dropped engagement 38% in week 6. The September membership window opens week 11 and currently reuses the same copy template.
items.suggestedAction: draft p011 instagram Reel pillar=Promotional campaign="Back-to-Routine Edu" hook="We coach 8 per cohort. Three spots left for September."

items.title: Kill the TikTok experiment or change format
items.rationale: TikTok watch time has stayed below 8s on every post for 4 weeks. Plan said Q3 was a learning quarter - we have the learning. Continuing to post here is overhead, not signal.
items.suggestedAction: pause platform=tiktok reason="watch time below 8s across 4 weeks - no format-market fit" carry="funds to instagram reels"

items.title: Founder LinkedIn moment on Women's Equality Day (Aug 26) is the highest-leverage day this month
items.rationale: Audience is 60% women per brief. p005 (corporate-wellness LinkedIn) already surfaced to 3 HR titles. Stacking the founder-narrated Women's Equality Day post on the same channel within 14 days compounds the HR-DM signal.
items.suggestedAction: draft p010 linkedin "Article post" pillar="Brand & Lifestyle" campaign="Coach Spotlight Series" date=2026-08-26 hook="I almost left strength training in 2022. Here's what kept me."

items.title: Community pillar is under-used relative to its 25% weight
items.rationale: Of 6 published posts, only 1 sits in Community (p006, still in_review). Plan target is 25% Community. We're at 0% delivered, 17% planned. The Maya transformation post is blocked on consent - propose 1 alternative member story while that unblocks.
items.suggestedAction: draft p012 instagram Reel pillar=Community campaign="Member Transformations" hook="Three weeks. Twelve sessions. One push-up streak." image=request-from-coach-lena

items.title: Swap CTA on p004 reruns from 'Sign up - link in bio' to capacity framing
items.rationale: The challenge launch (p004) drove 41 DMs in 48h - intent is there, urgency tactics aren't needed. Capacity-based CTA matches learning l003 and the brand voice.
items.suggestedAction: revise p004 cta="Cohort caps at 100. 3 weeks of coaching included."

items.title: Coach Spotlight #2 on LinkedIn before the founder Aug 26 moment
items.rationale: Coach Spotlight series has 1 published entry (p002, Lena). Adding a second coach 1-2 weeks before the founder moment warms the LinkedIn audience and gives the algorithm signal on the format.
items.suggestedAction: draft p009 linkedin "Article post" pillar="Brand & Lifestyle" campaign="Coach Spotlight Series" date=2026-08-19 hook="Coach Diego doesn't talk about discipline. He talks about Tuesday."

items.title: Re-run the bottle rule carousel format with a sleep angle
items.rationale: p001 ('The 3-Bottle Rule') hit 412 saves - solid baseline for prescriptive list-of-3 carousels. Sleep is in the audience's desires per brief.
items.suggestedAction: draft p008 instagram Carousel pillar=Education hook="The 3-tab rule: cut these by 9pm and your training day starts the night before."
